Title: Data Platform Infrastructure Acquisition
Description: Procure, install, and provision new hardware for data streaming platform (PostgreSQL, Kafka, Iceberg, Flink, Trino). Server Spec: Dell R660/R760 or HPE DL380 Gen11, 2× Xeon Gold 6430, 256GB RAM, 3-tier storage (2× 3.84TB NVMe hot, 4× 3.84TB SATA RAID10 warm, 4× 8TB HDD RAID10 cold), 2× 10GbE. Budget: $18-25K new / $12-18K refurb.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Hardware purchased within budget
• Server installed and configured
• Ubuntu 22.04 LTS provisioned
• Storage tiers operational
• System documentation complete
• Handoff to data engineering team complete

Title: Hardware Procurement
Description: Specify requirements, obtain quote from approved vendor, and purchase hardware.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Technical specification documented
• Vendor quote received and approved
• Purchase order issued
• Hardware delivered

Title: Prepare Technical Specification and Request Quote
Description: Document all hardware requirements and submit quote request to approved vendor.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Spec includes CPU, RAM, storage (with RAID configs), network requirements
• Quote request submitted to vendor
• Quote deadline communicated

Title: Review Quote and Approve Purchase
Description: Review vendor quote, verify technical compliance and pricing, obtain internal approvals.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Quote received and reviewed
• Technical compliance verified (no SAN, correct drive types)
• Price within budget ($18-25K new / $12-18K refurb)
• Internal approvals obtained

Title: Issue PO and Coordinate Delivery
Description: Submit purchase order and schedule hardware delivery to data center.
Acceptance Criteria:
• PO approved and submitted
• Delivery date confirmed
• Receiving location prepared
• Facilities team coordinated

Title: Physical Installation and RAID Configuration
Description: Install server in rack, configure RAID arrays, and verify hardware health.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Server racked with power and network
• All 3 storage tiers configured in RAID
• Hardware diagnostics passed
• System ready for OS installation

Title: Rack Server and Connect Infrastructure
Description: Mount server, connect dual power supplies and network cables, coordinate with facilities team.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Server mounted in rack
• Dual PSUs connected to separate circuits
• 2× 10GbE network connected
• Rack space and cooling verified

Title: Configure Storage RAID Arrays
Description: Configure 3-tier storage: Hot (2× 3.84TB NVMe), Warm (4× 3.84TB SATA RAID10 ~12TB), Cold (4× 8TB HDD RAID10 ~16TB).
Acceptance Criteria:
• Hot tier NVMe configured
• Warm tier RAID10 array created and initialized
• Cold tier RAID10 array created and initialized
• All arrays show healthy status
• RAID configs documented

Title: Run Hardware Diagnostics
Description: Execute Dell ePSA or HPE diagnostics to verify all components.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Diagnostics completed successfully
• No hardware errors detected
• Test results documented

Title: Ubuntu Provisioning and Configuration
Description: Install Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, configure storage mounts, networking, and security.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Ubuntu 22.04 LTS installed and updated
• All storage tiers mounted (/data/hot, /data/warm, /data/cold)
• Static IPs configured
• SSH hardened and firewall enabled
• System ready for application deployment

Title: Install Ubuntu and Configure Storage Mounts
Description: Install Ubuntu 22.04 LTS and mount all storage tiers with appropriate filesystems (XFS).
Acceptance Criteria:
• Ubuntu installed on NVMe
• All volumes formatted (XFS recommended)
• Mount points created and configured in fstab
• Storage permissions set
• Mounts verified persistent

Title: Configure Network and Security
Description: Set static IPs, harden SSH, enable firewall, and configure automatic security updates.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Static IPs configured for both interfaces
• SSH key-based auth enabled, root login disabled
• UFW firewall configured and enabled
• Unattended security updates configured
• fail2ban installed

Title: Install Management Tools and Verify System
Description: Install monitoring agents, configure remote management (DRAC/iLO), and perform final system verification.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Monitoring agent installed (if applicable)
• DRAC/iLO configured
• System health verified
• All services operational

Title: Documentation and Handoff
Description: Create system documentation and hand off to data engineering team.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Hardware and network documentation complete
• Credentials documented securely
• Access provided to data engineering team
• Handoff meeting conducted

Title: Create System Documentation
Description: Document hardware specs, network config, storage layout, RAID configs, and operational procedures.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Hardware inventory documented (model, serial, specs)
• Network configuration documented (IPs, VLANs)
• Storage architecture documented (tiers, RAID, mounts)
• Access procedures documented
• Basic runbook created

Title: Conduct Team Handoff
Description: Transfer knowledge, credentials, and access to data engineering team. Obtain sign-off.
Acceptance Criteria:
• Handoff meeting conducted
• Documentation reviewed with team
• Credentials transferred securely
• SSH access verified for team members
• Sign-off obtained
